data.name: KINKY LIZARD!
data.detailed_description:
KINKY LIZARD! The wildest animated clicker with charming lizard girls!

A hidden corner of a magical forest isn't just a haven for mythical creatures. It's home to mischievous and alluring lizard girls who crave new experiences and... company. They are made for fun and secret fantasies, and now they are looking for someone to be their perfect partner for the most uninhibited woodland games. Your presence is the key to their wild hearts!

What is there to do?

  • 🦎 Meet the Lizard Girls: Each of these beauties is unique — with her own personality, style, and attitude!

  • 🌿 Explore Forest Secrets: Discover all the hidden nooks and magical spots where your new girlfriends live and play.

  • 🔥 Ignite Fantasies: Help the lizard girls unwind and fulfill their boldest and most naughty desires.

  • ✨ Unlock Steamy Scenes: The better you get to know each lizard, the more revealing and interactive animations await you!

  • 🎮 Enjoy the Clicker Gameplay: Simple and engaging mechanics where every click brings you closer to new adventures.

  • 🎵 Immerse in the Atmosphere: A relaxing soundtrack and the magical visuals of a true fairy-tale forest.

KINKY LIZARD! is a game full of charm, natural magic, and uninhibited fun. Step into their wild world, befriend these unique beauties, and help them unveil their most playful fantasies!

data.short_description: Enter a magical forest full of seductive lizard girls! KINKY LIZARD! is an animated clicker where you help these charming reptiles unwind and explore their wildest, most playful desires.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 匈牙利文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 土耳其文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
